title: viola × fennica
intro: Viola × fennica, also known as the hybrid violet, is a rare and unique plant resulting from the cross between Viola riviniana and Viola lactea. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Viola × fennica include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
